judgment.summary: HIMS is a fast-growing company with strong margins but is currently loss-making and carries significant debt.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter missed EPS estimates by a wide margin; next earnings date is 2026-08-10.
positives: Revenue growth 3.8% YoY, indicating top-line expansion.
Free cash flow (TTM) $174.31M shows positive cash generation.
Forward P/E 17.81x is reasonable given growth expectations.
negatives: Operating margin -7.9% and Profit margin -0.6% indicate the company is not yet profitable.
Analyst growth estimates for the current quarter (-54.5%) and fiscal year (-15.3%) are negative.
Last quarter's EPS surprise was a significant miss (-1267.9%).
Debt/Equity ratio of 253.72 is very high, indicating substantial leverage.

news.paragraph: With no recent headlines, Hims & Hers Health, Inc. (HIMS) faces an upcoming earnings report on August 10th, 2026. The company's last reported quarter showed a significant EPS miss, and analyst estimates project negative earnings growth for the current quarter and fiscal year. Traders should monitor the upcoming earnings for any guidance changes or operational updates that could impact the stock.
